pain_points.text: Provide engineering, architecture design, assessment, and technical support for projects
pain_points.jd_anchor: provide engineering, architecture design, assessment, and technical support
pain_points.stakes: This role requires delivering expert technical solutions and assessments to ensure security projects are well-designed and effectively supported.

pain_points.text: Run daily processes and tools for managing cybersecurity including Vulnerability Management, Security Logging, Monitoring, and Incident Response
pain_points.jd_anchor: run daily processes and tools for managing cybersecurity
pain_points.stakes: Effective daily management of cybersecurity tools and processes is critical to maintaining organizational security posture and timely incident detection and response.

pain_points.text: Perform penetration testing, ethical hacking, and security assessments against Networks, Web Applications, API, Mobile Applications, IoT Devices, and Public Cloud Infrastructure
pain_points.jd_anchor: perform penetration testing, ethical hacking, and security assessments
pain_points.stakes: Identifying vulnerabilities through testing and assessments is essential to proactively protect systems and applications from attacks.

pain_points.text: Collaborate in creation of technical collateral and provide training in your area of expertise
pain_points.jd_anchor: collaborate in the creation of technical collateral and provide training
pain_points.stakes: Sharing knowledge and producing clear documentation and training materials helps build team capability and supports organizational security awareness.

pain_points.text: Write, review, and edit reports, use cases, and system documentation
pain_points.jd_anchor: write, review, and edit reports and system documentation
pain_points.stakes: Clear and accurate documentation and reporting are vital for communicating security findings and supporting decision-making.

candidate_evidence.summary: Mapped workflows and tech environment to security risks during migration, demonstrating assessment and design skills.
Supported software security operations by identifying risks and helping protect proprietary APIs and internal tools.
Built a SAST reporting workflow ingesting findings and converting raw scanner output into clean reports for vulnerability management.
Designed security automation workflows for vulnerability discovery and remediation tracking with alerting and approval gates.
Built monitoring and approval-gate workflows to detect automation failures and route remediation through human review.
Deployed centralized logging with alert conditions for Linux and Windows authentication events.
Helped build SAST reporting workflow converting raw scanner output into actionable reports, supporting vulnerability assessment.
Supported software security operations including risk identification and API protection, adjacent to penetration testing.
Presented migration risks and security considerations to technical and non-technical stakeholders, demonstrating communication and training support.
Supported secure code training efforts to help developers meet PCI compliance expectations.
Translated technical vulnerability findings into actionable reporting for decision-makers.
Presented findings and recommendations to leadership, improving understanding of security risks.

missing_evidence.note: No direct evidence of performing penetration testing or ethical hacking; candidate has adjacent experience in risk identification and software security operations.
